title: Trieste, Friuli-Venezia Giulia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Trieste, Friuli-Venezia Giulia: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Trieste is a city in Friuli-Venezia Giulia with a population of 200,000. A fascinating border city where Latin, Slavic, and Germanic cultures meet, with a grand Habsburg-era square and a dramatic Adriatic setting.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
